case_title: JAMES B. WRIGHT VS. KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-29-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

REQUEST FOR RESET SC-150 FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JAMES B.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-04-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JAMES B. WRIGHT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PRIOR TO THE SCHEDULED HEARING, PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE CLERK THAT THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 11/4/16. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
